narrative:
Colerain Township has 2,906 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.7 percentage points.
